title: [NES+VRC6 Remix] - Legends of Zelda 3 - Menu Screen
description:
Title: Legends of Zelda 3: A Link to the Past - Menu Screen / Fairy Fountain
Original composer: Kondo Koji
Cover/Remix by: Daniel "Kuhneghetz" Ohlsson
Tracker used: FamiTracker
Sound-Chip used: RP2A07 (Nes PAL), Konami VRC6

A playable NSF of this song can be downloaded here:
https://mega.nz/file/Y4YgDTxA#QedpsoomFLzRbYuGpxS2jdNB1U3aprNQY1L-21otQls
